name: 28"x84" Botanical Washable Runner Rug Indigo - Threshold™
description:
Dress up any space in your home in charming style with this Botanical Washable Runner Rug from Threshold™. This washable runner features an allover leaves pattern in an indigo hue with finished edges for a beautiful look that will coordinate easily with a variety of decor aesthetics. The olefin construction provides soft underfoot comfort, while latex backing helps to keep it in place. Plus, the low pile height makes it super easy to clean, making it highly versatile for high-traffic areas like your kitchen, living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
